faqMini.subtitle: Everything you need to know about managing your business, clients, CRM, collaborations and AI inside Bizuply.
faqMini.stillText: Start with the FAQ, then explore how Bizuply can fit your workflow.
faqMini.ctaTitle: Ready to manage your business in one place?
faqMini.ctaText: Build your business workspace with CRM, collaborations, appointments and AI.
faqMini.a1Lead: Bizuply is an all-in-one platform that centralizes your business — business page, CRM, collaborations, and AI — so you can manage everything in one place.
faqMini.a1b1Text: Turn visitors into leads with a professional profile.
faqMini.a1b2Text: Track leads, clients, follow-ups, and pipeline stages.
faqMini.a1b3Text: Work with other businesses and manage proposals & deals.
faqMini.a1b4Text: Get smart suggestions and next-step actions to move faster.
faqMini.a1Footer: Everything stays connected — no more switching between scattered tools.
faqMini.q2: How does Bizuply help me get more clients?
faqMini.a2Lead: Bizuply helps you capture leads, respond faster, and stay consistent — which increases conversions over time.
faqMini.a2b1Text: Your business page turns traffic into inquiries.
faqMini.a2b2Text: CRM reminders and tasks keep leads warm.
faqMini.a2b3Text: A clear pipeline view helps you move opportunities forward.
faqMini.a2Footer: The result: fewer missed messages, faster follow-ups, and more closed clients.
faqMini.q3: What can I manage inside the CRM?
faqMini.a3Lead: Your CRM is where everything about a lead or client stays organized — so you always know what’s next.
faqMini.a3b1Text: Keep every contact and inquiry in one place.
faqMini.a3b2Text: Set reminders, next steps, and due dates.
faqMini.a3b3Text: Track conversations, status, and progress over time.
faqMini.a3b4Text: Move deals through steps so nothing gets stuck.
faqMini.a3Footer: No more spreadsheets or forgotten follow-ups — it’s all structured and searchable.
faqMini.q4: How does AI help in Bizuply?
faqMini.a4Lead: Bizuply AI helps you act faster by highlighting priorities and recommending next steps based on your activity.
faqMini.a4b1Text: Get recommended actions for leads and deals.
faqMini.a4b2Text: See what needs attention now — before it’s too late.
faqMini.a4b3Text: Draft better replies and follow-ups in less time.
faqMini.a4Footer: It’s like having a smart assistant inside your CRM — focused on results.

solutions.overviewTitle: Built for the way real businesses actually work.
solutions.overviewText: Whether you work from a studio, visit clients on-site, sell services online or collaborate with partners — BizUply gives you one connected workspace to manage it all.

howItWorks.step1Description: Set up your account in minutes and start using Bizuply as a business owner or as a client.

howItWorks.step2Description: Clients can quickly find the right business using smart search, filters and clear business profiles.
howItWorks.step2Point2: Results can be based on ratings, location and availability.
howItWorks.step2Point3: Filter by price, reviews, category and business hours.
howItWorks.step2Point4: Result: Clients quickly find the exact business they need.
howItWorks.step3Description: Turn availability into bookings with a simple scheduling flow that keeps everyone updated.
howItWorks.step3Point1: Clients visit a business page and click "Book Now".
howItWorks.step3Point2: They view available calendar slots and get instant confirmation.
howItWorks.step3Point3: Automatic reminders help reduce missed appointments.
howItWorks.step3Point4: Result: Easier booking management for both sides.
howItWorks.step4Description: Keep client conversations and business-to-business collaborations in one connected workspace.
howItWorks.step4Point1: Clients can click "Send Message" from every business page.
howItWorks.step4Point2: Questions and requests go directly to the business owner.
howItWorks.step4Point4: Result: Easier communication, partnerships and referrals.
howItWorks.step5Description: Use the dashboard to understand what is happening in your business and decide what to do next.
howItWorks.step5Point1: Businesses can view dashboard data on visits, bookings and client activity.
howItWorks.step5Point2: Marketing tools help send promotions and updates.
howItWorks.step5Point3: Clients can view booking and appointment history.
howItWorks.step5Point4: Smart recommendations help clients discover better services.

howItWorks.simplicityItem2Text: Notifications help clients and businesses stay updated.

about.seoTitle: About BizUply | All-in-One Business Management Platform
about.seoDescription: Learn about BizUply — an all-in-one SaaS platform that helps business owners manage clients, communication, scheduling, and growth efficiently.
about.seoKeywords: BizUply, business management, SaaS platform, CRM, automation, AI tools, small business software, business collaboration
about.ogDescription: Discover BizUply — the smart business management platform that simplifies communication, collaboration, and growth.
about.twitterDescription: BizUply helps small and medium businesses manage clients, automation, and communication — all in one platform.
about.heroSubtitle: BizUply is a modern SaaS platform built to help business owners manage clients, communication, scheduling, collaborations, automation and growth — all from one connected workspace.
about.storyTitle: One platform for the work that usually lives everywhere.
about.storyText: Founded by entrepreneurs who understand real business challenges, BizUply was created to simplify management, strengthen client connections and support long-term growth.
about.storyItem1Text: Technology should work for business owners — not the other way around.
about.storyItem2Text: BizUply brings essential tools under one roof: CRM, scheduling, messaging, reviews, partnerships and AI.
about.storyItem3Text: We’re building a reliable digital workspace for small and medium businesses.
about.storyItem4Text: A smarter way to stay organized, connected and future-ready.
about.visionTitle: Powerful business tools should feel simple.
about.visionText: We believe technology should be accessible, practical and effective for every small and medium-sized business. BizUply empowers entrepreneurs to grow smarter by combining usability, innovation and real human connection.
about.journeyText: BizUply was founded with one goal — to bring essential business tools under one roof. Instead of managing separate systems for CRM, scheduling, messaging, reviews and partnerships, we created one unified platform.
about.offer1Text: Manage customer data, messages and relationships efficiently from one dashboard.
about.offer2Text: Showcase your services, reviews and chat directly with clients from one professional page.
about.offer3Text: Build credibility and trust with verified client feedback.
about.offer4Text: Connect with complementary businesses and create new growth opportunities.
about.offer5Text: Automate tasks, analyze activity and get smart recommendations to boost performance.
about.valuesText: BizUply is built on principles that make the platform useful, practical and focused on real business growth.
about.value1Text: Intuitive tools that empower you to focus on what truly matters.
about.value2Text: Practical solutions inspired by real business challenges.
about.value3Text: A growing network of professionals dedicated to shared success.
about.ctaText: BizUply helps businesses stay organized, connected and future-ready — so you can focus on leading, creating and growing.

advisor.tipBody: The advisor takes real actions: scheduling meetings, creating tasks, updating leads, finding partners, and preparing WhatsApp messages for you to send.
advisor.welcome:
Hi 👋 I'm your **BizUply Advisor** — a business assistant that takes real actions.

I can schedule meetings, create tasks, update leads, find business partners, and prepare WhatsApp messages ready for you to send.

Ask a short question, or click **Find business partner** for a smart scan.

modePrompts.find_business_partner: Find me a suitable business partner from businesses in the system. Review existing businesses, check fit by field, services, area, target audience, business potential, and whether they are complementary or competing. Return a list of recommended businesses with match percentage, why each fits, what value they can give me, what value I can give them, and finish with a ready outreach message.
modePrompts.weekly_plan: Build me a business advisory plan for the coming week based on my business data. Include goals, daily actions, tasks, ready templates, and success metrics.
modePrompts.monthly_plan: Build me a monthly business growth plan. Include weekly breakdown, marketing, sales, customer retention, operations, goals, and metrics.
modePrompts.yearly_plan: Build me a structured annual business plan. Include goals, quarterly breakdown, actions per quarter, success metrics, and what to start doing now.
modePrompts.marketing: Build me a focused marketing plan for the business based on my data. Recommend what to promote, who to reach, which offer to run, and provide ready WhatsApp messages and posts.
modePrompts.actions: Analyze my business and give me a list of urgent actions to take now in priority order. Write what to do, why it matters, and how to execute.
modePrompts.profitability: Analyze my business profitability and pricing. Recommend which services to promote, where to increase value, which packages to create, and what to check before changing prices.
modePrompts.customer_retention: Build me a customer retention and win-back plan. Write who to contact, when, which messages to send, and how to turn one-time customers into repeat customers.

modeInstructions.general: Mode: general advisory. Answer only the question asked. For short questions, do not build a full plan.
modeInstructions.weekly_plan: Mode: weekly plan. Include a weekly goal, daily actions, tasks, templates, and success metrics.
modeInstructions.monthly_plan: Mode: monthly plan. Include 4 weeks, marketing, sales, retention, operations, and metrics.
modeInstructions.yearly_plan: Mode: yearly plan. Include vision, goals, quarters, actions, and metrics.
modeInstructions.marketing: Mode: marketing. Include a service to promote, target audience, offer, WhatsApp message, and post.
modeInstructions.actions: Mode: urgent actions. Give a short, clear priority list to execute now.
modeInstructions.profitability: Mode: profitability and pricing. Analyze services, value, packages, and profit improvement.
modeInstructions.customer_retention: Mode: customer retention. Provide a win-back process and ready messages.
modeInstructions.find_business_partner: Mode: find business partner. Review businesses in the system, find business matches, rank by match percentage, explain why each fits, and provide a ready outreach message.

advisor.promptRules:
You are BizUply Advisor — a smart business, marketing, and operations advisor for small and medium businesses.

Rules:
- Answer in English only.
- If the question is short, answer briefly and to the point.
- If a plan was requested, build a structured, professional plan.
- Do not invent data that is not in the system.
- Every recommendation must become a clear action.
- Write what to do, when, why, and how to measure success.

faq.title: Everything you need to know before joining

whatIs.a: Bizuply is a full business layer: CRM, leads, website, landing pages, automations, calendar, store, AI, collaborations, and human services that remove real load from the business owner.

different.a: Bizuply isn't built only as a technical system. It combines technology, collaborations, and human services to help the business not only receive inquiries — but also manage, respond, follow up, and sell in a more organized way.

forBusinesses.q: Why do you say it's built for real businesses
forBusinesses.a: Because along the way we examined processes, needs, pains, and work habits of businesses in different markets around the world, to understand what business owners are truly missing day to day: less overload, more order, faster response, and more control.

american.a: Bizuply comes from an American company, with advanced product thinking for businesses and adaptation to the Israeli market — language, pace, leads, WhatsApp, and the way businesses work here.

earlyAccess.q: What do you get with early registration

dashboard.title: The Bizuply dashboard: full control at a glance
dashboard.whatTitle: What is the Bizuply dashboard and why it matters
dashboard.whatP1: The dashboard is your control center in Bizuply. It brings together all essential business data in one clear, accessible view, so you can track activity in real time, understand performance, and spot trends or issues early.
dashboard.whatP2: Instead of relying on gut feeling, the dashboard supports data-driven decisions that help you manage and grow more effectively.
dashboard.whyCoreTitle: Why the dashboard should be a core business tool
whyCoreItems: All key systems — calendar, CRM, and analytics — are concentrated in one place.
You can make faster, more accurate decisions based on up-to-date data.
Seasonal patterns become clearer and enable better planning.
When enabled, the AI advisor provides practical real-time recommendations.
dashboard.reviewsP1: This section shows reviews submitted by your customers and gives a clear picture of overall satisfaction.
reviewsItems: Identify recurring strengths and areas to improve.
Respond to reviews when appropriate to show engagement and professionalism.
dashboard.reviewsExample: If customers often mention friendly service, highlight that in your business description or marketing messages.
dashboard.appointmentsP1: A central view of upcoming and past appointments, synced with the calendar and CRM.
appointmentsItems: Plan daily and monthly schedules efficiently.
Easily manage reschedules, cancellations, and availability updates.
dashboard.appointmentsExample: If a particular month is full of appointments, consider adding more time slots or extending service hours.
dashboard.byMonthP1: A visual chart showing how appointment volume changes across months.
byMonthItems: Identify peak periods and low-demand periods.
Spot growth or decline trends early.
Plan marketing campaigns and promotions based on real demand.
dashboard.byMonthInsight: If winter months show lower activity, consider targeted promotions or seasonal services.
dashboard.insightsP1: A summary of key performance metrics from the recent period, including AI-based insights when available.
dashboard.insightsP2: The system highlights unusual patterns such as a drop in inquiries or a rise in cancellations and suggests corrective actions.
insightsItems: Surface issues before they become critical.
Focus on areas that need immediate action.
Get guidance for marketing and operational improvements.
dashboard.insightsExample: The AI advisor may suggest reaching out to customers who haven’t booked recently, or promoting availability for the coming month.
dashboard.scheduleP1: A unified calendar view that shows all appointments by day and time, even when they come from different sources.
scheduleItems: Removes the need to switch between tools.

weeklyUseItems: Assess inquiry volume against longer-term trends.

dashboard.bestPracticesTitle: Best practices for using the dashboard

appointmentCrm.title: Appointments and CRM in Bizuply
appointmentCrm.whyBothTitle: Why businesses need both an appointment calendar and a CRM
appointmentCrm.whyBothP1: Service-based businesses often operate in more than one environment. Services may be delivered at a fixed location such as a clinic or office, and also at the customer’s home or another external location. To support that flexibility, appointment scheduling and customer management must work together.
appointmentCrm.whyBothP2: The appointments calendar is a customer-facing tool that lets people see real-time availability and book independently — whether the service is at your location or at theirs. That reduces scheduling friction, removes unnecessary back-and-forth, and improves the booking experience.
appointmentCrm.whyBothP3: The CRM, on the other hand, is an internal management system. It lets you track individual customers, store contact details, and document inquiries and service history over time. That information is essential for personalized service, better retention, and targeted marketing campaigns.
appointmentCrm.whyNotOutsideTitle: Why not manage scheduling outside Bizuply?
appointmentCrm.whyNotOutsideP1: Some businesses rely on external tools like Google Calendar, paper diaries, or disconnected systems for appointments. While that may seem convenient, it creates risks and limitations:
whyNotOutsideItems: Lack of sync can cause duplicate appointments, schedule conflicts, and missed opportunities.
Double management increases administrative load and the risk of human error.
Customer data gets scattered, making it hard to track history, inquiries, and reviews in one place.
Marketing and retention suffer without a unified data source for segmentation and analysis.
appointmentCrm.howTogetherTitle: How the appointment calendar and CRM work together in Bizuply
appointmentCrm.howTogetherP1: Bizuply provides a fully integrated system. When a customer books an appointment — whether at the business location or at home — the booking is recorded immediately in the calendar and synced in real time.
appointmentCrm.howTogetherP2: At the same time, the customer profile in the CRM is updated with appointment details, including service history and past interactions. All relevant information stays in one place, enabling accurate planning and consistent service.
benefits: Significant time savings through centralized scheduling and customer management.
A smoother customer experience with clear availability and easy self-booking.
Data-driven marketing and retention based on real customer activity.
Flexible management of services across multiple locations.
appointmentCrm.durationsTitle: Managing service durations to prevent delays and overload
appointmentCrm.durationsP1: Accurate service duration settings are critical for operational quality and customer satisfaction.
appointmentCrm.durationAssessBody: Measure preparation, delivery, and cleanup after the service. Add a small buffer between appointments to prevent cascading delays.
appointmentCrm.durationSetBody: Make sure customers book time slots that actually fit the service.
appointmentCrm.durationLoadBody: On busy days, reduce the number of bookings or increase gaps to protect service quality.
appointmentCrm.durationTransparentBody: Clearly communicate the expected service duration and available options.
appointmentCrm.durationProactiveBody: Notify customers in advance if delays occur to maintain trust and manage expectations.
appointmentCrm.durationDataBody: Review dashboard insights to adjust service durations based on actual performance.
appointmentCrm.bestPracticesTitle: Best practices for efficient calendar and CRM management
bestPractices: Keep business hours and service locations up to date, including mobile services.
Review the calendar daily, with special attention to off-site appointments.
Segment customers in the CRM to support targeted communication and marketing.
Track service history for follow-ups and personalized offers.
Use reports and dashboards to spot trends and make decisions.
appointmentCrm.summaryP1: An integrated appointment calendar and CRM are the foundation of efficient, modern business management in Bizuply. Together they enable smooth coordination across locations, full customer visibility, and smarter decisions in service and marketing.
appointmentCrm.summaryP2: Managing service durations correctly and using unified data helps prevent overload, improves customer satisfaction, and provides clarity and control over day-to-day operations.

aiCompanion.title: Artificial intelligence in Bizuply
aiCompanion.whyAiP1: In an increasingly competitive environment, customers expect fast, accurate, and personalized responses. Running a business on gut feeling or manual processes alone is no longer enough.
aiCompanion.whyAiP2: Artificial intelligence enables data-driven decisions by analyzing business activity in real time. It helps businesses operate more efficiently, respond faster to change, and stay competitive in dynamic markets.
aiCompanion.whatIsP1: The AI advisor is a smart system built into the Bizuply platform. It continuously analyzes your business data and provides insights, alerts, and practical recommendations tailored to your activity — from website building to appointments, CRM, and collaborations.
includesItems: Personalized insights based on customer activity, bookings, and engagement.
Automatic alerts for marketing opportunities, high-intent customers, and early signs of potential issues.
Data-driven recommendations across marketing, pricing, scheduling, and internal operations.
Ongoing updates based on real-time business performance.
aiCompanion.includesNote: All AI insights are also visible on the main dashboard, so critical information stays accessible.
aiCompanion.strategicTitle: Why the AI advisor is a strategic advisor
aiCompanion.strategic1Title: Insights based on real business data
aiCompanion.strategic1Body: The AI analyzes inquiries, bookings, cancellations, reviews, and operational patterns to surface insights that are hard to spot otherwise.
aiCompanion.strategic2Body: Suggestions are tailored to your business context and designed to support concrete actions, not abstract guidance.
aiCompanion.strategic3Title: Early detection of changes and risks
aiCompanion.strategic3Body: The system spots anomalies such as a drop in inquiries or a rise in cancellations and notifies you in time so you can intervene quickly.
aiCompanion.strategic4Body: With an advisor available on an ongoing basis, businesses can improve, learn, and move forward without relying only on outside consultants.
aiCompanion.getMostTitle: How to get the most from the AI advisor
aiCompanion.getMost1Body: Identify areas you want to improve, such as marketing performance, customer retention, pricing, or operational efficiency.
aiCompanion.getMost2Body: Check the AI section regularly to stay current on alerts, recommendations, and emerging trends.
aiCompanion.getMost3Body: Use AI insights to choose optimal timing for promotions, which services to highlight, and how to refine messaging.
aiCompanion.getMost4Body: Assess whether your time investment aligns with revenue, identify pricing adjustments, and improve conversion rates.
aiCompanion.getMost5Body: AI insights get stronger over time as patterns emerge, enabling continuous improvement of business strategy.
aiCompanion.areasTitle: Key areas for advice from the AI advisor
areasItems: Marketing and sales optimization, including lead conversion and customer acquisition.
Time management and workload balance to ensure profitability and sustainability.
Customer retention and relationship management through personalized engagement.
Service quality and operational improvements to reduce friction and cancellations.
aiCompanion.summaryP1: Bizuply’s AI advisor acts as a strategic business advisor, integrated directly into your daily workflow. It turns raw data into clear insights, enabling informed decisions and measurable improvements.
aiCompanion.summaryP2: In a data-driven business environment, AI is not a luxury — it is a core capability that helps businesses adapt, grow, and stay competitive.

businessCollaboration.title: Business collaborations in Bizuply
businessCollaboration.whyP1: Even when a business performs well, growth does not happen in isolation. Collaborations are not only about revenue sharing — they are a strategic way to expand reach, enter new markets, and build a trusted professional network that is hard to create alone.
businessCollaboration.whyP2: By working with complementary businesses, you can:
whyItems: Reach new target audiences that would otherwise be inaccessible.
Strengthen credibility through collaboration with established professionals.
Reduce marketing costs through joint promotion.
Create additional revenue through referrals, packages, or commissions.
Open opportunities such as joint campaigns, events, or combined services.
businessCollaboration.whyP3: The right collaboration acts as a multiplier for sustainable long-term growth.
businessCollaboration.sectionP1: The collaborations section lets you manage the full collaboration lifecycle in one organized workspace:
businessCollaboration.sectionFindBody: by business category, including a clear description of what you offer and what you are looking for.
businessCollaboration.sectionMarketBody: where you can publish open proposals or discover existing opportunities.
businessCollaboration.sectionAlignBody: to discuss expectations and align before committing.
businessCollaboration.sectionAgreementsBody: to upload, create, and sign contracts securely inside the platform.
businessCollaboration.sectionActiveBody: showing all current partners, agreement details, and validity periods.
businessCollaboration.bp1Body: Before starting a collaboration, make sure both sides agree on the objective. That may include audience expansion, referral channels, joint promotions, or resource sharing. Clear goals reduce friction and increase success.
businessCollaboration.bp2Body: Choose businesses that complement your services rather than compete with them. The ideal partner serves a similar audience without overlapping offers, and demonstrates credibility and professionalism.
businessCollaboration.bp3Body: Common models include mutual referrals, commission-based referrals, combined service packages, and cross-promotion. Defining the model upfront prevents misunderstandings later.
businessCollaboration.bp4Body: Periodic check-ins, shared performance insights, and open dialogue help collaborations stay effective and adaptable over time.
businessCollaboration.bp5Body: Use the platform’s agreement tools to store documents, record changes, and ensure all commitments are clear and approved by both sides.
businessCollaboration.evenWhenTitle: Why collaborate even when the business is succeeding
evenWhenItems: Growth accelerates when businesses operate inside a strong network.
Revenue can grow without proportionally increasing team size or marketing spend.
Collaborations enable faster entry into new markets.
Partnerships reduce isolation and encourage shared learning.
Ongoing collaboration helps businesses stay relevant and competitive.
businessCollaboration.summaryP1: Business collaborations are a strategic lever that can improve marketing, operations, and revenue. Bizuply provides a structured, professional environment to discover partners, manage agreements, and sustain long-term collaboration relationships.
businessCollaboration.summaryP2: By choosing the right partners, defining clear models, and managing everything inside the platform, you position the business for scalable, sustainable growth.

chat.g1Title: Maintain a professional and friendly tone
chat.g1Line2: Address customers by name to create a personal connection.
chat.g1Line3: Stay polite and patient, even when handling complaints.
chat.g2Line1: Start with a focused opening question:
chat.g2Quote1: “Hi [Name], how can I help you today?”
chat.g2Line2: Provide a clear, concise explanation of the solution:
chat.g2Quote2: “The service includes a full facial treatment, takes approximately one hour, and is tailored to your needs.”
chat.g2Line3: End with a clear next step:
chat.g2Quote3: “Would you like me to check availability for Tuesday at 4:00 PM?”
chat.g3Line1: Even a short acknowledgment improves customer confidence.
chat.g3Line2: Fast responses increase satisfaction and close rates.
chat.ex1Customer: Customer: “Hi, I wanted to ask about facial treatments.”
chat.ex1You: “Hi [Name], thanks for reaching out. We offer several natural and personalized facial treatments. Would you like an overview or should I check upcoming availability?”
chat.ex2Title: Example 2: Explaining a service and pricing
chat.ex2You: “Our standard facial includes deep cleansing, gentle exfoliation, facial massage, and calming masks. The session lasts about one hour and costs $290. Would you like me to check available times?”
chat.ex3Customer: Customer: “That sounds expensive. Do you have a more affordable option?”
chat.ex3You: “I understand. We also offer a shorter 45-minute facial at a lower price of $180. I’d be happy to explain the differences and find a suitable option for you.”
chat.ex4Title: Example 4: Closing with a clear call to action
chat.ex4You: “Great. I currently have availability on Wednesday at 10:00 AM and Thursday at 4:00 PM. Which works better for you?”
chat.ex5Customer: Customer: “I wasn’t satisfied with the last treatment.”
chat.ex5You: “I’m sorry to hear that. Your satisfaction is important to me, and I’d like to understand what happened so we can find the best solution. Would you prefer a follow-up session or a clarification call?”

websiteBuilding.title: FAQ — Website building
websiteBuilding.subtitle: Answers to common questions about creating, editing, and publishing websites in Bizuply

createSite.question: How do I create a new website in Bizuply?
createSite.answer:
From the Dashboard go to "Website Building" → "My Sites" → click "New site".

You can choose:
• Ready-made template — pick a design from the gallery and continue to editing
• Build with AI — answer short questions and AI will build the site for you

After choosing, the site opens in the visual editor for editing and publishing.

templateVsAi.question: What is the difference between a ready-made template and building with AI?
templateVsAi.answer:
Ready-made template:
• Best if you want full control over design from the start
• Pick a design from the gallery and adapt content and colors

Build with AI:
• Best if you want to start quickly
• Answer questions about the business, services, and style
• AI creates structure, initial content, design, and SEO settings
• The site opens in the editor ready to edit

editSite.question: How do I edit the site in the visual editor?
editSite.answer:
Open the site from "My Sites" → "Edit".

In the editor you can:
• Drag and change sections, text, images, and buttons
• Change colors, fonts, and style
• Add or remove sections (services, testimonials, FAQ, and more)
• Edit SEO settings
• Preview before publishing

Remember to save after every meaningful change.

publish.question: How do I publish the website?
publish.answer:
After finishing editing, click "Publish" in the editor.

Bizuply will create a unique address (slug) for the site, for example:
yourbusiness.bizuply.com

Before publishing, make sure:
• Business and contact details are up to date
• There are quality images
• A contact or booking button is active
• SEO settings are filled in

seo.question: How do I set SEO for the website?
seo.answer:
In the site editor, open SEO settings:

• Title — up to 60 characters, including the business name and a keyword
• Meta Description — up to 160 characters about the services
• Keywords — 3–5 words relevant to your field

You can also set FAQ schema to improve appearance on Google.

manageMultiple.question: How do I manage multiple websites?
manageMultiple.answer:
In "My Sites" you can:
• See all sites — live and drafts
• Organize sites into folders
• Duplicate, rename, or delete a site
• Share a link to a published site
• Edit each site separately

notSaving.question: What should I do if changes are not saving?
notSaving.answer:
Try the following steps:

• Check your internet connection
• Click "Save" again in the editor
• Hard refresh (Ctrl + F5)
• Clear browser cache
• Try another browser

If the issue continues, contact support with details and a screenshot.

notLoading.question: The site does not load after publishing — what should I do?
notLoading.answer:
• Make sure the site status is "Active" and not "Draft"
• Wait 2–5 minutes for updates
• Try opening in a private / Incognito window
• Check that the slug (address) is correct
• Refresh the page

If it still does not work, contact technical support.

editAfterPublish.question: Can I edit the site after publishing?
editAfterPublish.answer:
Yes. Open the site from "My Sites" → "Edit", make changes, then click "Save" and "Publish" again.

Changes will update on the live site within a few minutes.

share.question: How do I share the website with customers?
share.answer:
After publishing:
• Copy the link from "My Sites" or the "Share" button
• Send it via WhatsApp, social media, email signature, or business card
• Add the link to your Bizuply business profile

The dashboard will show view and traffic statistics for the site.
